case_title: CARY VENTURE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. GEORGIOU STUDIO INC DBA GEORGIOU

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SAMSON, IVOR ELIAS SUBSTITUTED FOR BARKER, ANNE MARIE AS ATTORNEY FOR CARY VENTURE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARY VENTURE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGIOU STUDIO INC DBA GEORGIOU $17,336.95 PRINCIPAL, $505.40 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,172.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARY VENTURE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU STUDIO INC DBA GEORGIOU OEX HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2012 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
DECLARATION OF ANNE OGLE-KNEE REGARDING INTEREST CALCULATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARY VENTURE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARY VENTURE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU STUDIO INC DBA GEORGIOU JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
POS OF CIVIL SUBPOENA FOR PERSONAL APPEARANCE AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AT TRIAL AND OEX FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARY VENTURE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER OF EXAMINATION MAR-13-2012 DISCHARGED - NO APPEARANCE BY THE CREDITOR. (514)
